rag_rules: Repair function call arity mismatches by matching the number of arguments to the declared function signature.
generic_rules: Fix type mismatches by ensuring helper declarations and expressions use consistent AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
Ensure all identifiers in contracts are visible at the annex scope; avoid referencing non-declared or implementation-private entities.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE function calls must exactly match the declared number of parameters.
Use 'eq' declarations to create typed helper expressions that resolve complex conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix type or arity errors; resolve by correcting existing declarations or calls.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
